data.body: 7 changes on stack (all hooks-green, plan-review PASS): +2e037c9fc anole (agent-build invariants). 6/7 CHILDREN DONE (arawana, mamba, arcticduck, hoopoe, drake, anole). ONLY blackbear (INTEGRATOR) remains: two-scope gate posture across 3 gate CLIs, exit-11 (amend FROZEN docs/exit-codes.md + test_exit_codes.py + enumerate CI/Gerrit consumers), OPTIONAL coverage.resolution_class+coverage.diagnostic on all 3 verdict schemas, never-sign structural guard + pre-sign fingerprint recheck in sign_manifest, MCP structured failure return, final runner.py reconciliation, all 4 ADRs, consolidated docs. Preserve per-criterion fail-open. Starting blackbear review --ref HEAD. AFTER blackbear: git rebase origin/main, push stack to gerrit refs/for/main, get LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1 per change, close children bottom-first after Verified+1, close bug meerkat --reason, close epic, submit top.
